# @aai/og-components

> Oil & Gas asset map components for React. By AAI Agency.

## What this is

A React component library for visualizing O&G assets (wells, pipelines, facilities) on interactive Mapbox maps with production charts, overlay uploads, drawing tools, and detail cards.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @aai/og-components
```

## Key import

```ts
import { OGMap, type Asset } from "@aai/og-components";
import "mapbox-gl/dist/mapbox-gl.css";
```

## Minimal usage

```tsx
<OGMap assets={assets} mapboxAccessToken="pk.xxx" />
```

## Data model

Every entity is an Asset with these required fields:

```ts
{ id, name, type, status, coordinates: { lat, lng }, properties: {} }
```

## Agent docs

- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md) - Full usage guide with examples, options, and data formats
- [registry.json](./registry.json) - Component catalog with descriptions, dependencies, and metadata
- [.claude/SKILL.md](./.claude/SKILL.md) - Claude Code auto-discovery skill
- [llms.txt](./llms.txt) - This file

## Available components

- OGMap - Interactive asset map with clustering, color schemes, overlays, drawing tools
- ProductionChart - Oil/gas/water time series chart with dual Y-axis and zoom
- AssetDetailCard - Detail panel showing asset info on click
- OverlayManager - Upload and manage KMZ/KML/GeoJSON/Shapefile overlays
- SelectionPanel - Multi-select assets by drawing shapes
- LocalStorageStore - Save data to browser storage
- SqliteStore / createSqliteStore - Save data to in-browser SQLite for large datasets

## Requirements

React 18+, Mapbox access token
